name: twenty
description: Build Twenty apps, search docs, configure workspace MCP, prepare app listings, and retrieve workspace data in readable form.

interface.shortDescription: Build apps, set up MCP, and retrieve workspace data
interface.longDescription: Use Twenty to scaffold and troubleshoot Twenty apps with create-twenty-app, search official Twenty documentation through the bundled docs MCP server, configure workspace-specific Twenty MCP servers with OAuth, retrieve workspace data as readable Markdown, and prepare README, marketplace metadata, logos, and screenshots for Twenty apps.
